command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== HERMES VERSION ==="
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python -m hermes_cli.main --version 2>/dev/null || \
  cat /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/package.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('version:', d.get('version','unknown'))" || \
  echo "unknown"

echo "=== HERMES INSTALL METHOD ==="
ls /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/

echo "=== PYTHON VERSION ==="
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python --version

echo "=== PIP PACKAGES (hermes) ==="
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/pip show hermes-cli 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo "=== CURRENT SERVICE FILE ==="
cat /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service

echo "=== CURRENT CONFIG telegram section ==="
python3 -c "
import yaml, sys
try:
    with open('/home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml') as f:
        cfg = yaml.safe_load(f)
    tg = cfg.get('telegram', {})
    print('telegram:', tg)
    print('model default:', cfg.get('model',{}).get('default'))
    print('ollama_host:', cfg.get('model',{}).get('ollama_host'))
except Exception as e:
    print('error:', e)
"

echo "=== WEBHOOK CURRENTLY REGISTERED ==="
BOT_TOKEN=8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}/getWebhookInfo" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get('result',{}); print('url:', r.get('url')); print('pending:', r.get('pending_update_count')); print('last_error:', r.get('last_error_message'))"

echo "=== SOUL.MD EXISTS ==="
ls /home/jose/.hermes/SOUL.md 2>/dev/null && echo "YES" || echo "NO"
cat /home/jose/.hermes/SOUL.md 2>/dev/null

echo "=== HERMES-API SERVICE ==="
cat /etc/systemd/system/hermes-api.service 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
